message:
fix: strip bd stdout warnings to prevent JSON parse corruption

bd sometimes emits 'warning: ...' lines to stdout instead of stderr,
corrupting JSON output for downstream parsers. Strip them in run()
and runWithRouting().

Fix-merge of PR #2428 (stripStdoutWarnings portion only).
PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2428
Co-authored-by: keaganvanzyl <keaganvanzyl@users.noreply.github.com>
